seo.title: Roofing Contractor Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your roofing company. Route upset homeowners to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Roofing Contractors
hero.subheading: A dry roof feels like relief, not a photo op. ReviewFlo asks after final inspection when homeowners still remember the leak.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Roofing Contractor Faces

items.heading: High tickets make emotions run hot
items.body: Insurance, supplements, and delays feel personal before anyone opens Google.

items.heading: Quiet roofs do not remind people to post
items.body: Once the leak stops, life moves on.

items.heading: Storm chasers poison trust in your whole market
items.body: Homeowners lump every roofer into the same story.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Roofing Contractors

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after final walk-through
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when the job is complete and payment is settled.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask after punch list sign-off
items.body: Send when gutters run clean and debris is gone.

items.heading: Private first for leak callbacks
items.body: Warranty issues reach you before public panic.

items.heading: Storm season scale
items.body: Batch sends when crews are slammed without adding headcount.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, after scary leaks and insurance stress that finally felt handled.

items.a: Same routing model sized for local roofing crews, not national call centers.
